github.note: Read issues, PRs, create draft PRs. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN env var.

postgres.note: Read-only SELECT queries. Never use for mutations in production.

filesystem.note: Scoped to src/, docs/, tests/ only. Do not expand scope without team review.

_comment: Remove any server your project does not use.
Add project-specific servers below this comment.
Never store API keys here — use environment variables.
Document each tool's allowed actions in AGENTS.md under 'MCP tools'.
